title: Add Integrated Admin Panel for Site Content Management

requirements.summary: Create admin panel at /admin route with login authentication and dashboard sections for managing founder info, projects, services, and viewing contact submissions
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin shows a login form.
Incorrect credentials show an error message; correct credentials grant access to the dashboard.
Dashboard has clearly labeled tabs or sidebar sections: Founder, Projects, Services, Contact Submissions.
Founder section allows editing name, title, bio, and photo URL; save updates the backend.
Projects section lists all projects with edit and delete buttons; add new project form is present.
Services section lists all services with edit and delete buttons; add new service form is present.
Contact Submissions section lists all received messages with sender name, email, message, and timestamp.
Public-facing sections (TeamSection, PortfolioSection, ServicesSection) read data from the backend and reflect admin changes.

file_operations.description: Create login page component that validates admin credentials (username: admin, password: Nikhil@123) against the backend authenticate method. Display error message on failed login, redirect to dashboard on success. Use react-hook-form for form handling and shadcn/ui components for styling.

Create admin dashboard layout component with a sidebar or tabs navigation (Founder, Projects, Services, Contact Submissions) and a content area that renders the selected section. Include logout functionality that clears authentication state and redirects to /admin login.

Create founder info editor component with form fields for name, title, bio, and photo URL. Fetch current founder data using getFounder backend method on mount. On save, call updateFounder backend method with form values and show success/error feedback. Use react-hook-form and shadcn/ui form components.

Create projects management component that fetches and displays all projects using getAllProjects backend method. Include a list view with edit and delete buttons for each project, plus an add new project form. Edit mode populates form with existing data and calls updateProject; add mode calls addProject; delete calls deleteProject. Show loading states during operations.

Create services management component that fetches and displays all services using getAllServices backend method. Include a list view with edit and delete buttons for each service, plus an add new service form. Edit mode populates form with existing data and calls updateService; add mode calls addService; delete calls deleteService. Show loading states during operations.

Create contact submissions viewer component that fetches and displays all contact form submissions using getContacts backend method. Display each submission in a card or table row showing name, email, message, and formatted timestamp. Include loading state while fetching data.

Create authentication hook that manages admin login state using React state and localStorage persistence. Provide login function that calls backend authenticate method, logout function that clears state, and isAuthenticated boolean. Check isAdminAuthenticated backend method on mount to restore session.

Import React Router components (BrowserRouter, Routes, Route) and wrap the existing app layout in routing. Add routes for /admin (AdminLogin when not authenticated, AdminDashboard when authenticated) and / (existing home page with all sections). Add ProtectedRoute wrapper for admin dashboard that checks authentication state and redirects to login if not authenticated.

Create route guard component that uses useAuth hook to check authentication status. If authenticated, render children; otherwise redirect to /admin login page. This component wraps the AdminDashboard route.

requirements.summary: Update public-facing components to fetch content from backend instead of using hardcoded data
acceptanceCriteria: TeamSection displays founder info (name, title, bio, photo) fetched from the backend.
PortfolioSection displays projects fetched from the backend.
ServicesSection displays services fetched from the backend.
Contact form submissions in CTASection are stored via a backend call.
Loading states are shown while data is being fetched.

file_operations.description: Replace hardcoded team member data with a call to getFounder backend method using useActor hook. Fetch founder data on component mount and display loading state while fetching. Map the returned Founder object to display name, title, bio, and photo. Handle error state if fetch fails. Keep existing animations and layout structure.

Replace hardcoded project data with a call to getAllProjects backend method using useActor hook. Fetch projects on component mount and display loading state while fetching. Map the returned Project array to the existing card layout, displaying title, description, category, image, and results. Handle error state if fetch fails. Keep existing animations and mockup styling.

Replace hardcoded services data with a call to getAllServices backend method using useActor hook. Fetch services on component mount and display loading state while fetching. Map the returned Service array to the existing 3D tilt cards, displaying title, description, and icon. Handle error state if fetch fails. Keep existing animations and interactive effects.

Update contact form submission handler to call submitContact backend method with name, email, and message values using useActor hook. Show loading state during submission and display success message on completion. Handle error state if submission fails. Keep existing form validation and success state UI.

Add React Query hooks for fetching founder data (useFounderQuery), projects (useProjectsQuery), services (useServicesQuery), and contacts (useContactsQuery) that wrap the corresponding backend methods. Each hook should use useQuery with appropriate cache keys and stale time settings. These hooks will be used by the admin dashboard and public components to ensure consistent data fetching and caching.
